channel.title: MIT Bitcoin Expo 2025 on ₿itcoin Transcripts
channel.description: Recent content in MIT Bitcoin Expo 2025 on ₿itcoin Transcripts

item.title: Bitcoin Core Developer Roundtable
item.description: Speaker 0: 00:00:00 Maybe just to start things off, let’s do a quick round of introductions and maybe add on why you work on Bitcoin Core. You want to start with Gloria? Speaker 1: 00:00:10 Sure. Hello, I’m Gloria. I went to college, not this one, but I went to college. So like a lot of college students, I really wanted to save the world. I was interested in technological solutions to social problems.
